title: Blood Flow as Continuous Depth Gradient

analysis.object: T559: Blood Flow as Continuous Depth Gradient depth analysis

aorta_turbulent.description: Aorta: Re~4000; turbulent; EML-inf in systole peaks
aorta_turbulent.reason: Aorta approaches EML-inf at peak systole; turbulent patches observed

arteries_eml3.description: Arteries: Re~1000; transitional; EML-3 oscillatory with Womersley flow
arteries_eml3.reason: Womersley number governs pulsatile EML-3 oscillation in arteries

capillaries_eml0.description: Capillaries: Re~0.01; Stokes flow; EML-0 single-file red blood cells
capillaries_eml0.reason: Capillary flow is EML-0: discrete cells, no inertia, fully reversible

heartbeat_pump.description: Heartbeat is EML-3 pump driving EML-2 mean flow through EML-0 capillaries
heartbeat_pump.reason: Heart = EML-3 oscillator driving full depth gradient throughout body

analysis.theorem: T559: Blood Flow as Continuous Depth Gradient (S838).

key_theorem: T559: Blood Flow as Continuous Depth Gradient (S838).
